_comment: Source map for ci/sync-releases.py. Metadata is read from the private Gitea host (loopback) and written source-free to releases/data/. Binaries are published to the PUBLIC GitHub Releases hub (AuditToolkitLabs/releases) with per-product namespaced tags '<slug>-<tag>'. A release's assets only get a working download_url once that tag exists on GitHub. Add the other 7 products here after the SIP prototype is approved.

products.name: Storage Intelligence Platform
products.blurb: Distributed storage inventory, classification, and change-tracking.

products.name: Litmus
products.blurb: Agentless asset-based compliance audit, remediation, and reporting.

products.name: Linux Host Lite
products.blurb: Lightweight Linux host security baseline auditing and reporting.

products.name: Windows Security Lite
products.blurb: Lightweight Windows endpoint security baseline auditing and reporting.

products.name: macOS Security Lite
products.blurb: Lightweight macOS endpoint security baseline auditing and reporting.
